'''Bill Slichter''' was a [[Wikipedia:Voice acting|voice artist]] in the [[Crimson Empire (audio drama)|audio drama version of ''Crimson Empire'']].<ref name="Crimson Empire">[[Crimson Empire (audio drama)|''Crimson Empire'' audio drama]]</ref> Slichter also voiced a goon and [[Unidentified orderly (Mercy)|an orderly]] in [[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Rebel Agent'' audio drama]].<ref name="Rebel Agent" />

{{Bio-stub}}
